name: Confessor Basil, Bishop of Parium
troparia: (Tone 8) Guide of orthodoxy, teacher of piety and purity,* luminary of the world, inspired adornment of hierarchs, O wise Basil,* you have enlightened all by your teachings, O spiritual trumpet.* Intercede with Christ our God for the salvation of our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 2) Having been illumined by the light from on high,* you enlighten all who honor your trials with love.* O father and martyred priest Basil, O blessed saint,* pray unceasingly for all of us to Christ our God.
